text: Describe a React project you shipped end-to-end.
suggestedAnswer: Built React app with reusable components, API integration, testing, and measurable impact.

text: How do you structure a Node.js Express API for scale?
suggestedAnswer: Use layered architecture, middleware, validation, services, and modular routes.

text: Explain one challenging bug and how you resolved it.
suggestedAnswer: Reproduced issue, isolated root cause, added fix, and wrote regression tests.

text: How do you design MongoDB collections for interview platform data?
suggestedAnswer: Model sessions, answers, questions, and indexes for query patterns.

text: What is your approach to API error handling?
suggestedAnswer: Use consistent status codes, structured error payloads, and centralized handlers.

text: How do you optimize React render performance?
suggestedAnswer: Split components, avoid heavy re-renders, and profile bottlenecks.

text: How do you validate and sanitize user-uploaded data?
suggestedAnswer: Validate type/size, sanitize content, and enforce safe parsing rules.

text: Describe your testing strategy for backend routes.
suggestedAnswer: Write unit and integration tests with edge cases and failure paths.

text: How do you handle asynchronous workflows in JavaScript?
suggestedAnswer: Use async/await, bounded retries, and clear timeout/error behavior.

text: Tell me about a time you improved developer experience.
suggestedAnswer: Modularized code, documented APIs, and reduced onboarding time.

text: How do you decide what to log in production?
suggestedAnswer: Log key events, errors, latency, and trace IDs without sensitive data.

text: What trade-offs matter when choosing SQL vs MongoDB?
suggestedAnswer: Compare consistency, joins, schema flexibility, and query complexity.

text: How do you secure authentication and session handling?
suggestedAnswer: Use secure tokens, expirations, hashing, and transport protections.

text: Describe a feature where you balanced speed and code quality.
suggestedAnswer: Delivered MVP quickly with tests and later refactored safely.

text: How would you monitor interview pipeline health?
suggestedAnswer: Track queue depth, response time, error rate, and completion ratio.

text: How do you collaborate with designers and product managers?
suggestedAnswer: Align on requirements, iterate with feedback, and communicate risks early.

text: Explain your Git workflow for team delivery.
suggestedAnswer: Use feature branches, code reviews, CI checks, and small merges.

text: How do you make UI flows robust on slow networks?
suggestedAnswer: Use optimistic states, retries, loading feedback, and graceful fallbacks.

text: What is your process for breaking down a complex feature?
suggestedAnswer: Define milestones, sequence dependencies, and ship incrementally.

text: How do you ensure accessibility in frontend features?
suggestedAnswer: Use semantic HTML, keyboard support, contrast checks, and labels.
